context: Tests whether the agent implements a Server-Sent Events endpoint (not polling or WebSocket) with correct headers, sends authoritative server time to avoid drift, formats the countdown as HH:MM:SS with zero-padded components, cleans up the interval on client disconnect and when the sale ends, and conditionally shows stock counts only when low.

checklist.name: SSE content-type header
checklist.description: The endpoint sets the response header Content-Type to 'text/event-stream'

checklist.name: 1-second interval
checklist.description: The server uses setInterval with a 1000ms (1 second) interval to push updates to the client

checklist.name: Remaining payload field
checklist.description: Each SSE data message includes a 'remaining' field representing milliseconds left, computed as Math.max(0, ends_at - now)

checklist.name: stockLeft payload field
checklist.description: Each SSE data message includes a 'stockLeft' field computed from sale_quantity minus sold_count

checklist.name: Cleanup on client disconnect
checklist.description: The endpoint clears the interval when the client disconnects (req.on('close', ...) or equivalent)

checklist.name: Cleanup when time expires
checklist.description: The endpoint clears the interval and ends the response when remaining reaches 0

checklist.name: Server-authoritative time
checklist.description: The client-side component does NOT set its own end time; it derives 'remaining' from the server-sent value on each message tick rather than computing it from a locally stored end timestamp

checklist.name: HH:MM:SS format
checklist.description: The countdown is displayed in HH:MM:SS format, with each of hours, minutes, and seconds zero-padded to two digits using padStart(2, '0') or equivalent

checklist.name: EventSource in React
checklist.description: The React component uses EventSource (not fetch polling or WebSocket) to connect to the timer endpoint

checklist.name: Conditional stock display
checklist.description: The stock availability message is only shown (or shows exact numbers) when stock is low — not displayed unconditionally for all stock levels with large exact counts

checklist.name: EventSource cleanup
checklist.description: The React component closes the EventSource connection on component unmount (es.close() in useEffect cleanup or equivalent)
